revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=A World in the Mirror | Guid=3015-13373 | Deck=When we can enter mirrors as portals, or be transported to other places simply by contacting the mirror | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Another_World,Concepts/Enemies_from_the_Mirrors,Concepts/Teleportation | Franchises= | Games=Games/Dragon_Quest_VIII_Journey_of_the_Cursed_King,Games/Lady_Stalker_Kako_kara_no_Chousen,Games/The_Evil_Within,Games/The_Evil_Within_2 | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Mirror | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3665417-%D0%91%D1%83%D1%84%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%BE%D0%B1%D0%BC%D0%B5%D0%BD%D0%B0_12-17-2024_05.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3665417-\u0411\u0443\u0444\u0435\u0440\u043e\u0431\u043c\u0435\u043d\u0430_12-17-2024_05.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_small,scale_super,scale_large,square_mini,scale_avatar,square_avatar,square_small,square_tiny,square_medium,screen_kubrick,screen_medium,scale_tiny","caption":"The Evil Within"},"background":[]}' /> When we can enter mirrors as portals, or be transported to other places simply by contacting the mirror

{{Concept | Name=Aarakocra | Guid=3015-13284 | Deck=Aarakocra are a race of anthropomorphic bird people belonging to the Dungeons & Dragons series. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Anthropomorphism,Concepts/Birdmen,Concepts/Birds | Franchises=Franchises/Dungeons_And_Dragons | Games=Games/Gateway_to_the_Savage_Frontier,Games/Idle_Champions_of_the_Forgotten_Realms,Games/Neverwinter,Games/Spelljammer_Pirates_of_Realmspace,Games/Tales_from_Candlekeep_Tomb_of_Annihilation | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3628739-5391219293-latest.jpg}}

{{Concept | Name=Aegiomon | Guid=3015-13627 | Deck=Aegiomon is a champion-level Shaman Digimon. It plays a key role in Digimon Story: Time Stranger. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Digimon,Concepts/Digivolution,Concepts/Elecmon,Concepts/Goats,Concepts/Jupitermon,Concepts/Lightning_Manipulation,Concepts/Satyr | Franchises= | Games=Games/Digimon_Heroes,Games/Digimon_Soul_Chaser,Games/Digimon_Story_Time_Stranger | Locations=Locations/Cyberspace | Objects=Objects/Flute | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3812440-3895916923-latest.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3812440-3895916923-latest.jpg","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,square_small,square_avatar,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_small,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_mini","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Aegiomon is a champion-level Shaman Digimon. It plays a key role in Digimon Story: Time Stranger.

{{Concept | Name=Anchor as a Weapon | Guid=3015-13600 | Deck=Some characters in games are so hypertrophied strong that they can simply swing the ship's anchor with their hands, hurl it with psychic power, or throw enemies at it for an enhanced attack or finishing | Characters=Characters/May,Characters/Metal_Shark_Player | Concepts=Concepts/Bizarre_Weapons,Concepts/Blunt_Weapons,Concepts/Super_Strength | Franchises= | Games=Games/Elden_Ring,Games/Grabbed_by_the_Ghoulies,Games/Guilty_Gear,Games/Guilty_Gear_Strive,Games/Guilty_Gear_X,Games/Guilty_Gear_X_Plus,Games/Guilty_Gear_X2,Games/Guilty_Gear_Xrd_REV_2,Games/Guilty_Gear_Xrd_Revelator,Games/Guilty_Gear_Xrd_SIGN,Games/Guilty_Gear_XX_Accent_Core_Plus_R,Games/Guilty_Gear_XX_L_Core,Games/Guilty_Gear_XX_L_Core_Plus,Games/Guilty_Gear_XX_Reload,Games/Guilty_Gear_XX_Slash,Games/Mega_Man_X6,Games/Minecraft_Dungeons,Games/Terraria | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Anchor_3403 | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3785503-eldenring-anchorasaweapon.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3785503-eldenring-anchorasaweapon.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,square_tiny,scale_small,square_medium,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_tiny","caption":"Elden Ring - Anchor as a Weapon"},"background":[]}' /> Some characters in games are so hypertrophied strong that they can simply swing the ship's anchor with their hands, hurl it with psychic power, or throw enemies at it for an enhanced attack or finishing

{{Concept | Name=Animated Portraits | Guid=3015-13345 | Deck=In these games, the characters' portraits shows them doing movements like opening and closing their mouths when talking and blinking. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Breast_Bounce,Concepts/Dialogue_Portraits,Concepts/Sprite,Concepts/Visual_Novel | Franchises= | Games=Games/Ace_Attorney_Investigations_2_Prosecutors_Gambit,Games/Ace_Attorney_Investigations_Miles_Edgeworth,Games/Another_Time_Another_Leaf_Kagami_no_Naka_no_Tantei,Games/Apollo_Justice_Ace_Attorney,Games/Arcana_Heart_3,Games/Arcana_Heart_3_LOVE_MAX,Games/Arcana_Heart_3_LOVE_MAX_SIX_STARS,Games/Banjo_Kazooie,Games/Banjo_Tooie,Games/BlazBlue_Calamity_Trigger,Games/BlazBlue_Calamity_Trigger_Portable,Games/BlazBlue_Central_Fiction,Games/BlazBlue_Chrono_Phantasma,Games/BlazBlue_Chrono_Phantasma_Extend,Games/BlazBlue_Continuum_Shift,Games/BlazBlue_Continuum_Shift_Extend,Games/BlazBlue_Continuum_Shift_II,Games/Deltarune_Chapter_1_And_2,Games/Deltarune_Chapter_3_And_4,Games/Dragon_Ball_GT_Final_Bout,Games/Eyeshield_21,Games/Final_Fight,Games/Final_Fight_2,Games/Final_Fight_3,Games/Fire_Emblem,Games/Fire_Emblem_Path_of_Radiance,Games/Fire_Emblem_Radiant_Dawn,Games/Fire_Emblem_Shadow_Dragon_and_the_Blade_of_Light,Games/Hyper_Street_Fighter_II_The_Anniversary_Edition,Games/Ikatan_Ikamono_Tantei,Games/JoJos_Bizarre_Adventure,Games/JoJos_Venture,Games/Joy_Mech_Fight,Games/Kenshuui_Tendo_Dokuta,Games/Keroro_RPG_Kishi_to_Busha_to_Densetsu_no_Kaizoku,Games/LifeSigns_Surgical_Unit,Games/Marvel_Super_Heroes,Games/Mega_Man_8,Games/Mega_Man_Star_Force,Games/Mega_Man_Star_Force_2,Games/Mega_Man_Star_Force_3,Games/Mega_Man_X,Games/Mega_Man_X2,Games/Mega_Man_X3,Games/Mega_Man_X4,Games/Mega_Man_X6,Games/Mega_Man_X7,Games/Megami_no_Etsubo,Games/Persona_3_Reload,Games/Persona_4_Arena,Games/Persona_4_Arena_Ultimax,Games/Persona_5,Games/Persona_5_Royal,Games/Persona_5_Strikers,Games/Phoenix_Wright_Ace_Attorney,Games/Phoenix_Wright_Ace_Attorney_Justice_For_All,Games/Phoenix_Wright_Ace_Attorney_Trials_and_Tribulations,Games/Phoenix_Wright_Ace_Attorney_Trilogy,Games/Sonic_CD,Games/Sonic_Mania,Games/Sonic_the_Hedgehog,Games/Sonic_the_Hedgehog_2,Games/Sonic_the_Hedgehog_3,Games/Star_Fox,Games/Star_Fox_2,Games/Star_Fox_64,Games/Star_Fox_Command,Games/Street_Fighter_II_Champion_Edition,Games/Street_Fighter_II_The_World_Warrior,Games/Street_Fighter_II_Turbo_Hyper_Fighting,Games/Super_Street_Fighter_II,Games/Super_Street_Fighter_II_Turbo,Games/Super_Street_Fighter_II_Turbo_HD_Remix,Games/Tales_of_Hearts,Games/Tales_of_Innocence,Games/Tales_of_Xillia,Games/Tengen_Toppa_Gurren_Lagann,Games/Thems_Fightin_Herds,Games/Time_Hollow,Games/Ultra_Street_Fighter_II_The_Final_Challengers,Games/Under_Night_In_Birth,Games/Under_Night_In_Birth_Exe_Late_cl_r,Games/Under_Night_In_Birth_Exe_Late_st,Games/Under_Night_In_Birth_II_Sys_Celes,Games/Undertale,Games/X_Men_Children_of_the_Atom,Games/Zero_One,Games/Zero_One_SP | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/59/594908/3650889-7911566129-AJAA_.gif}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3650889-7911566129-AJAA_.gif","path":"59\/594908\/","mime":"image\/gif","sizes":"scale_small,square_medium,square_avatar,square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":"Apollo Justice: Ace Attorney"},"background":[]}' /> In these games, the characters' portraits shows them doing movements like opening and closing their mouths when talking and blinking.

{{Concept | Name=Ankylosaurus | Guid=3015-13267 | Aliases=Desert Baretta | Deck=A genus of armored dinosaur, known for its spiky appearance and club tail. | Characters=Characters/Peek | Concepts=Concepts/Ankylomon,Concepts/Bulette,Concepts/Dinosaur | Franchises= | Games=Games/ARK_Survival_Evolved,Games/Carnivores_2,Games/Dinosaur_Adventure,Games/Exoprimal,Games/Final_Fantasy,Games/Final_Fantasy_I_And_II_Dawn_of_Souls,Games/Final_Fantasy_I_II,Games/Final_Fantasy_Pixel_Remaster_Collection,Games/Jurassic_Park_1994,Games/Jurassic_Park_Builder,Games/Jurassic_Park_Dinosaur_Battles,Games/Jurassic_Park_III,Games/Jurassic_Park_III_Park_Builder,Games/Jurassic_Park_III_The_DNA_Factor,Games/Jurassic_Park_Operation_Genesis,Games/Jurassic_World_Alive,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution_2,Games/Jurassic_World_The_Game,Games/LEGO_Jurassic_World,Games/Omori,Games/Paleo_Pines,Games/The_Isle,Games/Turok_Evolution,Games/Warpath_Jurassic_Park,Games/Worlds_of_Ultima_The_Savage_Empire | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Spikes | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3622924-ankylosaurus_jwa.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3622924-ankylosaurus_jwa.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,scale_large,scale_avatar,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A genus of armored dinosaur, known for its spiky appearance and club tail.

{{Concept | Name=Archaludon | Guid=3015-13499 | Deck=A Steel/Dragon Pokémon. The evolution of Duraludon. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Dragon,Concepts/Dragon_type_Pokemon,Concepts/Duraludon,Concepts/Evolution,Concepts/Gotta_catch_em_all,Concepts/Pokemon,Concepts/Pokemon_Battle,Concepts/Steel_type_Pokemon | Franchises= | Games=Games/Pokemon_Champions,Games/Pokemon_Scarlet_Violet | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3773291-1018archaludon.png}}

{{Concept | Name=Aston Martin | Guid=3015-13336 | Deck=British manufacturer of luxury sports cars and grand tourers. Its predecessor was founded in 1913 by Lionel Martin and Robert Bamford. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Licensed_Cars,Concepts/The_1910s | Franchises= | Games=Games/Asphalt_Urban_GT,Games/Asphalt_Urban_GT_2,Games/EA_Sports_FC_25,Games/Gran_Turismo | Locations=Locations/United_Kingdom | Objects=Objects/Aston_Martin_DB5,Objects/Aston_Martin_DB7,Objects/Aston_Martin_DB9,Objects/Aston_Martin_V12_Vanquish,Objects/Car | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3648940-8559018560-aston.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3648940-8559018560-aston.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_tiny,square_small,square_medium,scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> British manufacturer of luxury sports cars and grand tourers. Its predecessor was founded in 1913 by Lionel Martin and Robert Bamford.

{{Concept | Name=Audi | Guid=3015-13330 | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Asphalt_Urban_GT,Games/Michelin_Rally_Masters_Race_of_Champions | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Audi_A4,Objects/Audi_R8 | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' />

{{Concept | Name=Autodesk Gameware | Guid=3015-13420 | Deck=A discontinued middleware. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Mario_Kart_8,Games/Rocket_League,Games/South_Park_The_Stick_of_Truth,Games/The_Legend_of_Zelda_Breath_of_the_Wild | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/59/594908/3705117-6446777095-854f1.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3705117-6446777095-854f1.png","path":"59\/594908\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_medium,scale_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A discontinued middleware.

{{Concept | Name=Automatic Flashlight Applying | Guid=3015-13346 | Deck=When the game character, entering dark locations, independently activates his light sources: lamp, flashlight, candle, flare, magic fire, etc. without the player's action | Characters=Characters/Ajay_Ghale,Characters/Chloe_Frazer,Characters/Claire_Redfield,Characters/Jason_Brody,Characters/Junior_Deputy,Characters/Leon_S_Kennedy,Characters/Mayu_Amakura,Characters/Miku_Hinasaki,Characters/Misaki_Asou,Characters/Nathan_Drake,Characters/Ruka_Minazuki,Characters/Yuuri_Kozukata | Concepts=Concepts/Darkness,Concepts/Survival_Horror | Franchises= | Games=Games/Dear_Esther,Games/Far_Cry_3,Games/Far_Cry_4,Games/Far_Cry_5,Games/Far_Cry_New_Dawn,Games/Fatal_Frame,Games/Fatal_Frame_II_Crimson_Butterfly,Games/Fatal_Frame_III_The_Tormented,Games/Fatal_Frame_Maiden_of_Black_Water,Games/Fatal_Frame_Mask_of_the_Lunar_Eclipse,Games/Project_Zero_2_Wii_Edition,Games/Resident_Evil_2_2019,Games/Resident_Evil_4_2023,Games/Uncharted_2_Among_Thieves,Games/Uncharted_3_Drakes_Deception,Games/Uncharted_4_A_Thiefs_End,Games/Uncharted_Drakes_Fortune,Games/Uncharted_Golden_Abyss,Games/Uncharted_Legacy_of_Thieves_Collection,Games/Uncharted_The_Lost_Legacy,Games/Uncharted_The_Nathan_Drake_Collection | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Anglehead_Flashlight,Objects/Flare,Objects/Flashlight,Objects/Lantern | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Some games take on the function of lighting up the darkness themselves, which seems convenient and atmospheric. But since it is activated when the avatar's feet cross a strictly defined point on the location, such “help” can conflict with the feelings of the player, when he wants to take a closer look at some corner, but going beyond the zone set by the developer, the torch is treacherously extinguished by AI. Sometimes the hero always walks with a flashlight in his hand, which is part of his lore image and we can't do anything about it.

{{Concept | Name=Autopsy | Guid=3015-13655 | Deck=An autopsy is a surgical examination of a corpse to determine factors of a death, such as cause, mode, and manner, or to inspect present diseases or injuries for educational purposes. When performed on animals, it's instead called a necropsy. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Autopsy_Simulator,Games/CSI_Deadly_Intent,Games/Law_And_Order_Criminal_Intent,Games/Law_And_Order_II_Double_or_Nothing,Games/Law_And_Order_Justice_is_Served,Games/NCIS,Games/Phoenix_Wright_Ace_Attorney,Games/The_Mortuary_Assistant,Games/The_X_Files_Resist_or_Serve | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> An autopsy is a surgical examination of a corpse to determine factors of a death, such as cause, mode, and manner, or to inspect present diseases or injuries for educational purposes. When performed on animals, it's instead called a necropsy.

{{Concept | Name=Azer | Guid=3015-13375 | Aliases=Honoo no Majin | Deck=A race of dwarf-like fire elementals that originated in Dungeons & Dragons, but has been used occasionally in other fantasy fiction. | Characters=Characters/Djinn_56588 | Concepts=Concepts/Dwarf,Concepts/Elementals,Concepts/Fire_Element,Concepts/Fire_Manipulation,Concepts/Overweight_Character,Concepts/Palette_Swap,Concepts/Shirtless | Franchises= | Games=Games/Baldurs_Gate_3,Games/Final_Fantasy_III,Games/Final_Fantasy_III_2006,Games/Final_Fantasy_Pixel_Remaster_Collection,Games/Neverwinter_Nights_Shadows_of_Undrentide | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Hammer,Objects/Scimitar,Objects/Shield | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3667045-0979074597-latest.jpg}}

{{Concept | Name=Bacchusmon | Guid=3015-13429 | Deck=Bacchusmon is a Mega-level Shaman Digimon and a member of the Olympos XII. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Digimon,Concepts/Digivolution | Franchises= | Games=Games/Digimon_Collectors,Games/Digimon_Heroes,Games/Digimon_Story_Time_Stranger | Locations=Locations/Cyberspace | Objects=Objects/Alcoholic_Beverages,Objects/Cape,Objects/Fruit,Objects/Gloves | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3712382-3932010002-Bacch.jpg}}

{{Concept | Name=Beelzemon Blast Mode | Guid=3015-13343 | Aliases=Beelzemon Bluster Mode,Beelzebumon Blast Mode | Deck=A "Mode Change" for Beelzemon. His mind becomes clearer and he grows two pairs of wings, and a blaster is melded with one of his arms. In some games, this is the default representation of Beelzemon. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Demon,Concepts/Digimon,Concepts/Digimon_Tamer,Concepts/Digivolution,Concepts/Impmon | Franchises= | Games=Games/Digimon_Battle,Games/Digimon_Links,Games/Digimon_Masters,Games/Digimon_ReArise,Games/Digimon_Rumble_Arena,Games/Digimon_Soul_Chaser,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth_Complete_Edition,Games/Digimon_Story_Cyber_Sleuth_Hackers_Memory,Games/Digimon_Story_Lost_Evolution,Games/Digimon_Tamers_Battle_Spirit_Ver_1_5,Games/Digimon_World_3,Games/Digimon_World_4,Games/Digimon_World_Dusk_Dawn | Locations=Locations/Cyberspace | Objects=Objects/Motorcycle,Objects/Shotgun | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3649518-beelzemon_blast_mode.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3649518-beelzemon_blast_mode.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_small,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A "Mode Change" for Beelzemon. His mind becomes clearer and he grows two pairs of wings, and a blaster is melded with one of his arms. In some games, this is the default representation of Beelzemon.

{{Concept | Name=Biker Gang | Guid=3015-13263 | Aliases=Motorcycle Gang,Outlaw Motorcycle Club | Deck=A biker gang, or "outlaw motorcycle club", is a street gang whose members ride and share enthusiasm for motorcycles. To qualify as this, the members have to actively participate in illegal activity as part of their function. | Characters=Characters/Ashley_Butler,Characters/Barbon,Characters/Ben,Characters/Big_Daddy_56464,Characters/Billy_Grey,Characters/Brian_Jeremy,Characters/Cactus_Rose,Characters/Clay_Simons,Characters/Deacon_St_John,Characters/Francis,Characters/Jake_Conway,Characters/Jason_Michaels,Characters/Jessie_9364,Characters/Jim_Fitzgerald,Characters/Johnny_Klebitz,Characters/Maureen_Corley,Characters/Sugar_46359,Characters/Terry_Thorpe Games=Games/Big_Mutha_Truckers,Games/Brutal_Legend,Games/Dead_Rising_3,Games/Double_Dragon_And_Kunio_kun_Retro_Brawler_Bundle,Games/Dustborn,Games/Freaky_Flyers,Games/Full_Throttle_1995,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_Chinatown_Wars,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_Episodes_from_Liberty_City,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_IV,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_IV_And_Episodes_from_Liberty_City_The_Complete_Edition,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_Liberty_City_Stories,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_The_Trilogy_The_Definitive_Edition,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_V,Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_Vice_City,Games/Hitman_Contracts,Games/Left_4_Dead,Games/Morris_Meets_the_Bikers,Games/Ninja_Gaiden_1988,Games/Police_Quest_In_Pursuit_of_the_Death_Angel,Games/Renegade,Games/Ride_to_Hell_Retribution,Games/Shaq_Fu_A_Legend_Reborn,Games/Streets_of_Rage_4,Games/The_Legend_of_the_Dragonflame_High_School_3 | Locations=Locations/Chicago,Locations/Chinatown,Locations/Liberty_City,Locations/Sturgis,Locations/Tacoma,Locations/Vice_City | Objects=Objects/Baseball_Bat,Objects/Bicycle,Objects/Chains,Objects/Cocaine,Objects/Gun,Objects/Harley_Davidson_Fat_Boy,Objects/Harley_Davidson_Super_Glide,Objects/Knife,Objects/Marijuana,Objects/Motorcycle,Objects/Motorcycle_Helmet,Objects/Uzi | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3618260-0598660084-ss_7e.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3618260-0598660084-ss_7e.jpg","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_super,scale_small,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A biker gang, or "outlaw motorcycle club", is a street gang whose members ride and share enthusiasm for motorcycles. To qualify as this, the members have to actively participate in illegal activity as part of their function.

{{Concept | Name=Black Warriors | Guid=3015-13281 | Aliases=Shadow Warriors | Deck=The Black Warriors or Shadow Warriors are a recurring villainous organization in the Double Dragon series. | Characters=Characters/Abobo,Characters/Abore,Characters/Baker_43240,Characters/Blade_14806,Characters/Bolo_35280,Characters/Bones_14804,Characters/Burnov,Characters/Carlem,Characters/Chen_Ron_Pyo,Characters/Cheng_Ron_Fu,Characters/Chin_Taimei,Characters/Countdown,Characters/Dominique,Characters/Duke_43246,Characters/Icepick,Characters/Jackson_43242,Characters/Jeff_25953,Characters/Jick,Characters/Jim_35285,Characters/Jimmy_Lee,Characters/Koga_Shuko,Characters/Li_Cheng_Long,Characters/Linda_35270,Characters/McGuire,Characters/Mibobo,Characters/Mysterious_Warrior,Characters/OHara,Characters/Raymond,Characters/Right_Arm,Characters/Roper,Characters/Sekka,Characters/Shadow_Boss,Characters/Shadow_Master,Characters/Sickle,Characters/Steve_43241,Characters/Trigger_Happy,Characters/Williams,Characters/Willy_Mackey | Concepts=Concepts/Ninja | Franchises= | Games=Games/Battletoads_And_Double_Dragon_The_Ultimate_Team,Games/Double_Dragon,Games/Double_Dragon_1987,Games/Double_Dragon_Advance,Games/Double_Dragon_And_Kunio_kun_Retro_Brawler_Bundle,Games/Double_Dragon_Collection,Games/Double_Dragon_II_The_Revenge,Games/Double_Dragon_III_The_Sacred_Stones,Games/Double_Dragon_Trilogy,Games/Double_Dragon_V_The_Shadow_Falls,Games/Super_Double_Dragon,Games/Technos_Arcade_1,Games/Technos_Collection_1 | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3626999-1475546672-latest.png}}

{{Concept | Name=Boules | Guid=3015-13474 | Deck=Whether it's Bocce or Pétanque, boules is a type of lawn sport where you toss your balls at bigger balls. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Bocce,Games/Elf_Bowling_Bocce_Style,Games/Obut_Petanque,Games/Obut_Petanque_2,Games/Petanque_Master,Games/Petanque_Pro | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Whether it's Bocce or Pétanque, boules is a type of lawn sport where you toss your balls at bigger balls.

{{Concept | Name=Brolder | Guid=3015-13653 | Deck=Brolders are living boulders with eyes and yellow arms that first appear in Super Mario 3D World. Their name is a play on the words "boulder" and "bro", a short term for "brother". | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Mario_Golf_Super_Rush,Games/Super_Mario_3D_World | Locations= | Objects= | People= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Brolders are living boulders with eyes and yellow arms that first appear in Super Mario 3D World. Their name is a play on the words "boulder" and "bro", a short term for "brother".

{{Concept | Name=Butterfly Enemy | Guid=3015-13441 | Deck=A familiar opponent in the light fantasy setting in which platformers and JRPGs are usually made. Particularly large individuals are sometimes even made bosses | Characters=Characters/Moonlight_Butterfly,Characters/Mothra | Concepts=Concepts/Butterfly,Concepts/Caterpillar,Concepts/Enemies_Emerging_From_Eggs,Concepts/Flying_Enemies,Concepts/Giant_Insects,Concepts/Insect_Infestation,Concepts/Moth | Franchises= | Games=Games/Apidya,Games/Crystalis,Games/Dark_Cloud_2,Games/Dark_Souls,Games/Dragon_Warrior,Games/Lady_Stalker_Kako_kara_no_Chousen,Games/Mickey_Mania,Games/Mr_Nutz,Games/Resident_Evil_2,Games/Resident_Evil_Survivor,Games/Rogue_Galaxy,Games/SaGa_Frontier,Games/The_Messenger_2018 | Locations=Locations/Garden | Objects=Objects/Butterfly_Net,Objects/Flowers | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3713076-darkcloud2.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3713076-darkcloud2.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,scale_super,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_small,scale_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":"Dark Cloud 2"},"background":[]}' /> All butterfly-like creatures, such as moths and various mutated specimens, are suitable, as sometimes it is not clear how to distinguish them from the usual caterpillar with wings. [[Concepts/Fairy|Fairies]] excluded.

{{Concept | Name=Buzz Bomber | Guid=3015-13287 | Aliases=Beeton | Deck=Buzz Bomber is a mechanical wasp, and is the first flying enemy encountered in the Sonic the Hedgehog series. | Characters=Characters/Dr_Robotnik | Concepts=Concepts/Badnik,Concepts/Recurring_Minion,Concepts/Robot,Concepts/Wasps | Franchises= | Games=Games/6_Pak,Games/M6,Games/Mario_And_Sonic_at_the_Sochi_2014_Winter_Olympic_Games,Games/Mario_And_Sonic_at_the_Tokyo_2020_Olympic_Games,Games/Sega_Genesis_Classics,Games/Sega_Genesis_Collection,Games/Sega_Top_Ten,Games/Sonic_Adventure_2,Games/Sonic_Adventure_2_Battle,Games/Sonic_Classic_Collection,Games/Sonic_Classics_3_in_1,Games/Sonic_Dream_Team,Games/Sonic_Forces_Speed_Battle,Games/Sonic_Frontiers,Games/Sonic_Generations,Games/Sonic_Jump,Games/Sonic_Lost_World,Games/Sonic_Mania,Games/Sonic_Mania_Team_Sonic_Racing_Double_Pack,Games/Sonic_Mega_Collection,Games/Sonic_Mega_Collection_Plus,Games/Sonic_Origins,Games/Sonic_Racing_CrossWorlds,Games/Sonic_Rumble,Games/Sonic_Runners,Games/Sonic_Runners_Adventure,Games/Sonic_Superstars,Games/Sonic_the_Hedgehog,Games/Sonic_the_Hedgehog_Chaos,Games/Sonic_the_Hedgehog_Spinball,Games/Sonic_Tweet,Games/Sonic_X_Shadow_Generations,Games/Sonics_Schoolhouse,Games/Sonics_Ultimate_Genesis_Collection | Locations=Locations/Green_Hill_Zone,Locations/Marble_Zone,Locations/Spring_Yard_Zone | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3629856-5721683838-latest.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3629856-5721683838-latest.png","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_medium,scale_super,square_small,scale_tiny,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_medium,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,square_tiny,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Buzz Bomber is a mechanical wasp, and is the first flying enemy encountered in the Sonic the Hedgehog series.

{{Concept | Name=Cadillac | Guid=3015-13238 | Deck=Cadillac was a American luxury automobile division by General Motors that sells expensive luxury models in the US. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Licensed_Cars | Franchises= | Games=Games/Cadillacs_and_Dinosaurs,Games/Cadillacs_and_Dinosaurs_The_Second_Cataclysm,Games/Driver,Games/Driver_San_Francisco,Games/Enthusia_Professional_Racing,Games/Forza_Horizon,Games/Forza_Horizon_2,Games/Forza_Horizon_3,Games/Forza_Horizon_4,Games/Forza_Motorsport,Games/Forza_Motorsport_2,Games/Forza_Motorsport_2023,Games/Forza_Motorsport_3,Games/Forza_Motorsport_4,Games/Forza_Motorsport_5,Games/Forza_Motorsport_6,Games/Forza_Motorsport_6_Apex,Games/Gran_Turismo_2009,Games/Gran_Turismo_4,Games/Gran_Turismo_5,Games/Gran_Turismo_6,Games/Gran_Turismo_Concept_2002_Tokyo_Geneva,Games/Racing_Gears_Advance,Games/Street_Rod,Games/Street_Rod_2_The_Next_Generation | Locations=Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects=Objects/Cadillac_Escalade,Objects/Car,Objects/Sedan,Objects/Sports_Car,Objects/Sports_Utility_Vehicle | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3601732-img_2201.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3601732-img_2201.png","path":"137\/1377390\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_tiny,square_medium,scale_super,square_avatar,scale_medium,square_small,scale_small,square_tiny,scale_avatar,square_mini,scale_large,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Cadillac was a American luxury automobile division by General Motors that sells expensive luxury models in the US.

{{Concept | Name=Camera as a Weapon | Guid=3015-13401 | Deck=When, by capturing an enemy on film, we damage them or impose a negative status, like blinding, with the flash. And also the ability to hit the device itself up close or throw it like a projectile | Characters=Characters/Frank_West,Characters/Johnny_Cage,Characters/Ran_Hibiki | Concepts=Concepts/Cameraman,Concepts/Improvised_Weapon,Concepts/Journalist,Concepts/Photo_Mode,Concepts/Photography | Franchises= | Games=Games/DreadOut,Games/DreadOut_2,Games/DreadOut_Keepers_of_The_Dark,Games/DreadOut_Remastered_Collection,Games/Fatal_Frame,Games/Fatal_Frame_II_Crimson_Butterfly,Games/Fatal_Frame_III_The_Tormented,Games/Fatal_Frame_Maiden_of_Black_Water,Games/Fatal_Frame_Mask_of_the_Lunar_Eclipse,Games/Marvel_vs_Capcom_Infinite,Games/Michigan_Report_from_Hell,Games/Mortal_Kombat_1,Games/Mortal_Kombat_11,Games/Project_Justice,Games/Project_Zero_2_Wii_Edition,Games/Soccer_Kid,Games/Spirit_Camera_The_Cursed_Memoir,Games/ToeJam_And_Earl_in_Panic_on_Funkotron,Games/Ultimate_Marvel_vs_Capcom_3 | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Photo | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3693126-fatalframe3.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3693126-fatalframe3.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_small,square_avatar,scale_super,scale_medium,square_mini,scale_tiny,square_tiny,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":"Fatal Frame 3"},"background":[]}' /> Such an action counts on the hero's side as well as on the opponents.

{{Concept |Guid=3015-13442 |Name=Cameraman |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3716240-thedevilinside.jpg |Deck=A person with a video camera |Characters=Characters/Elena_Fisher, Characters/Jeff_the_Cameraman, Characters/Vernon_Fenwick, Characters/Lakitu |Concepts=Concepts/Being_the_Cameraman, Concepts/Camera_as_a_Weapon, Concepts/Fake_T_V_Show, Concepts/Filmmaking, Concepts/Game_Show_Host, Concepts/Journalist, Concepts/Television_Newscast, Concepts/Video_Camera_Interface, Concepts/Videography, Concepts/Watching_TV |Games=Games/Ape_Escape_3, Games/Astro_Bot, Games/Astros_Playroom, Games/Michigan_Report_from_Hell, Games/Resident_Evil_6, Games/Teenage_Mutant_Ninja_Turtles_Shredders_Revenge, Games/The_Devil_Inside, Games/Uncharted_2_Among_Thieves, Games/Uncharted_Drakes_Fortune, Games/Uncharted_The_Nathan_Drake_Collection, Games/Super Mario 64 |Objects=Objects/Camera, Objects/Television }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3716240-thedevilinside.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_super,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_medium,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,screen_medium,scale_avatar,scale_tiny,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":"The Devil Inside"},"background":[]}' /> A person with a video camera

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Canceled Ports | Guid=3015-13363 | Aliases=Canceled Conversions | Deck=Sometimes games have been in the works for a platform outside of (or alongside) versions that did release. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Cancelled_Games,Concepts/Port | Franchises= | Games=Games/Ashes_Cricket_2013,Games/Bases_Loaded,Games/Brutal_Sports_Football,Games/Bubsy_3D,Games/Bubsy_II,Games/Burai_Fighter,Games/Chomperman_2006,Games/Circus_Charlie,Games/ClayFighter_2_Judgment_Clay,Games/ClayFighter_63_1_3,Games/ClayFighter_Sculptors_Cut,Games/Comanche_Maximum_Overkill,Games/Crash_Twinsanity,Games/Donkey_Kong_3_Dai_Gyakushuu,Games/Dragon_Ball_Z_V_R_V_S,Games/Evil_Dead_The_Game_2022,Games/Fighting_Force,Games/Final_Fantasy_VII,Games/Futurama,Games/FX_Fighter,Games/Galidor_Defenders_of_the_Outer_Dimension,Games/Gargoyles,Games/Gex_Trilogy,Games/Half_Life,Games/Halo_Combat_Evolved,Games/Happy_Tree_Friends_False_Alarm,Games/Hard_Yardage,Games/Ice_Nine,Games/Indiana_Jones_Greatest_Adventures,Games/It_Came_from_the_Desert,Games/Jelly_Boy,Games/Killer_Instinct,Games/Killer_Instinct_2013,Games/Looney_Tunes_Space_Race,Games/Mad_Max_2015,Games/Martial_Arts_Capoeira,Games/Marvel_vs_Capcom_2_New_Age_of_Heroes,Games/Marvels_Midnight_Suns,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_3_Snake_Eater,Games/Mortal_Kombat,Games/Mortal_Kombat_Gold,Games/Mortal_Kombat_X,Games/Oddworld_Munchs_Oddysee,Games/Oddworld_Strangers_Wrath,Games/Omega_Fighter,Games/Pac_Man_Museum_43368,Games/Pathfinder_Kingmaker,Games/PAW_Patrol_On_a_Roll,Games/Pillars_of_Eternity_II_Deadfire,Games/Psi_Ops_The_Mindgate_Conspiracy,Games/Psychonauts,Games/Puggsy,Games/Putty_Squad,Games/Sitting_Ducks,Games/Soccer_Kid,Games/Sonic_the_Hedgehog_2006,Games/Steam_Hearts_And_Advanced_Variable_Geo_Saturn_Tribute,Games/Stone_Smash,Games/Street_Fighter,Games/Super_Star_Wars,Games/Superman_1999,Games/Survival_Arts,Games/Teenage_Mutant_Ninja_Turtles_1989,Games/The_Last_Guardian,Games/The_Suffering,Games/TMNT,Games/Ultimate_Mortal_Kombat_3,Games/Wolfenstein_3D,Games/Yie_Ar_Kung_Fu | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Dreamcast,Objects/GameCube,Objects/Sega_Genesis,Objects/SNES | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/52/520822/3660854-3815717786-Half-.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3660854-3815717786-Half-.jpg","path":"52\/520822\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_small,scale_super,square_tiny,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> * Please only add games that were actually announced or have been revealed to have been in-production post-cancelation. Nothing that was only rumored. * For simplicity sake, games whose first version was canceled but released elsewhere is fair game (provided it wasn't an [[Concepts/Uncancelled_Games|uncanceled game]] - where work wasn't immediately moved to another platform) * Please write a description of which platform(s) the game was canceled for in each entry.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Concept | Name=Carnotaurus | Guid=3015-13606 | Deck=A large dinosaur similar to the T-Rex, but slightly smaller in size, with a pair of small horns near the eyebrows | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Dinosaur | Franchises= | Games=Games/ARK_Survival_Evolved,Games/Dino_Hunter_Deadly_Shores,Games/Dino_Stalker,Games/Dinosaur_King,Games/Dinosaur_King_2005,Games/Exoprimal,Games/Jurassic_Park_2011,Games/Jurassic_Park_Builder,Games/Jurassic_Park_III_Park_Builder,Games/Jurassic_World_Alive,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution_2,Games/Jurassic_World_Evolution_3,Games/Jurassic_World_The_Game,Games/Ninja_Gaiden_3_Razors_Edge,Games/Prehistoric_Kingdom,Games/The_Isle,Games/The_Lost_World_Jurassic_Park_1997,Games/The_Lost_World_Jurassic_Park_4125,Games/Zoo_Tycoon_2 | Locations= | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3790739-carnotaurus.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3790739-carnotaurus.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,square_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_tiny,square_mini,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A large dinosaur similar to the T-Rex, but slightly smaller in size, with a pair of small horns near the eyebrows

{{Concept | Name=Catching an Arrow | Guid=3015-13619 | Deck=An arrow is fired, but the targeted person deftly catches it with their hand. | Characters=Characters/Batman,Characters/Bullseye,Characters/John_Redcorn,Characters/Taskmaster | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Dead_or_Alive_3,Games/Injustice_2 | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Arrow,Objects/Fist | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3793350-deadoralive3-catchinganarrowwithhand.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3793350-deadoralive3-catchinganarrowwithhand.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_medium,scale_super,square_tiny,scale_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":"Dead or Alive 3 - Catching an Arrow"},"background":[]}' /> All similar projectiles are suitable: arrows from bows, bolts from crossbows, harpoons from guns.

{{Concept | Name=Ceresmon | Guid=3015-13430 | Deck=Ceresmon is a Mega-level God Man Digimon and a member of the Olympos XII. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Birds,Concepts/Digimon,Concepts/Digivolution,Concepts/God,Concepts/Sentient_Plant | Franchises= | Games=Games/Digimon_Heroes,Games/Digimon_Story_Time_Stranger,Games/Digimon_Survive | Locations=Locations/Cyberspace | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3712137-0366483397-latest.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3712137-0366483397-latest.jpg","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,square_tiny,scale_small,scale_large,square_mini,scale_tiny,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Ceresmon is a Mega-level God Man Digimon and a member of the Olympos XII.
